name: Fruit Smoothie 3
recipeIngredient: 1 frozen banana (cut into 1-inch chunks and frozen)
1/4 cup soy milk, orange juice, or water
recipeInstructions:
1. Add all ingredients to a blender.
2. Start with 1/4 cup of liquid and add more depending on desired thickness.
3. Blend in spurts until smooth.
Variations:
- Use peaches, blueberries, apple slices, or additional bananas instead of strawberries (or combine them). Adjust the amount of liquid based on fruit juiciness.
- Use fresh bananas and 1-2 ice cubes.
- Add cinnamon, plus one or more of: nutmeg, cloves, ginger, vanilla.
